title: Childhood vaccinations: Protecting children every day (poster) - Canada.ca
content:
## Childhood vaccinations: Protecting children every day (poster)
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 360 KB, 1 pages)
Organization: Public Health Agency Of Canada
Published: 2024-04-19
Childhood vaccines have been around for decades, are safe and proven to help protect children against 15 diseases.
- chickenpox (varicella)
- Hib ( Haemophilus influenzae type b)
- HPV (human papillomavirus)
- meningococcal disease
- pneumococcal disease
- whooping cough (pertussis)
For more information, speak with a health care provider or learn how to protect your child with routine vaccination .
